author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: Ecosystem-wide PM living-context map: audit, ADRs, roadmap, and forward backlog (2026-05-31)

Establish a best-practice, living project-management map of the entire pm-cli ecosystem: forward backlog, architectural decision records, a roadmap milestone, agent/user stories, and capability epics — without duplicating the 902 historical items.

(1) Forward backlog of open, well-defined items covers genuine future work + coverage gaps surfaced by per-domain audits; (2) Architectural ADRs recorded for real undocumented decisions; (3) Roadmap milestone + capability epics anchor the backlog; (4) Agent/user stories captured; (5) No duplicate items (every create dedup-checked via pm search); (6) Existing closed items are NOT modified (would mis-attribute them to this release in the changelog); (7) pm health/validate stay ok; (8) CI green + AI-bot review clean; (9) Sentry + telemetry verified post-change.
Per-domain read-only audits completed by specialized sub-agents; their work-logs and decisions recorded in pm under per-domain tracking tasks.
Make the tracker a complete, organized, living representation of the ecosystem (not just a completed-work log)
Future work, decisions, stories, and goals become discoverable context for humans and agents via pm
Agents get optimal next-work context; contributors see the roadmap and the why behind the architecture
An organized forward backlog (open), architectural ADRs (recorded), a roadmap milestone, and agent/user stories — all dedup-checked
Tracker has 902 items but ZERO open/in-progress: rich history, no living map. pm context returns empty. Best-practice PM needs a forward layer.

message: Open audit epic: ecosystem living-context map (forward backlog + ADRs + roadmap + stories), create-only on real tracker

patch.value: Ecosystem PM living-map audit complete: forward backlog, ADRs, roadmap milestone, capability epics, and agent/user stories created (create-only, dedup-checked). Meta-work recorded today.
The ecosystem audit organizes findings into capability areas, decisions, stories, and forward backlog without duplicating existing pm lineage.

The closed Epic 'Ecosystem-wide PM living-context map: audit, ADRs, roadmap, and forward backlog (2026-05-31)' captures the completed living-map audit synthesis and links the resulting tracker structure.
